name: One Shot Back
about: One Shot Back is a Cocktail Lounge & Golf Simulator located in Downtown Denver. They feature two high-end Trackman simulators and offer an upscale lounge setting with a focus on premium cocktails. The venue combines golf technology with a bar atmosphere, providing pool tables, darts, bag toss, and shuffleboard for entertainment. Pricing is based on hourly bay rentals, with options ranging from 30 minutes to 4 hours, and they also offer league play and event hosting services.
why_golfers_like_it: High-end Trackman simulators for accurate ball and club tracking
Premium cocktail lounge setting with a fun and unique 2-in-1 golf bar concept
Variety of entertainment options including pool, darts, bag toss, and shuffleboard
Central downtown Denver location with a growing area appeal

food_and_drink.notes: Small snacks available, full menu details can be found on their website
High-end cocktails with amazing flavors, full bar service

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify, but it's common practice at simulator venues. It's recommended to bring your own clubs unless you can confirm rental availability.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not allowed as the venue offers its own premium cocktails and small snacks.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website doesn't specify, but typical simulator play ranges from 1.5-2 hours for 18 holes depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The website doesn't explicitly mention kid-friendliness. Given it's a cocktail lounge with a focus on adult beverages and entertainment, it's likely more geared toward adults.
